series_metadata.series_title: Requisition Files for Purchase of Equipment, Materials and Services
series_metadata.series_description: Documents, specifications, quotations, and technical documentation necessary for the purchase of equipment, materials, and services required for maintenance operations

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after purchase authorization expiration date, any applicable warranty period has expired and/or equipment is disposed of. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after any applicable warranty period has expired and/or equipment is disposed of., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Trash
